prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7751名、8137名、7761名、6497名、10294名。2021-2024年位次在6500-8100区间波动，2025年大幅后移至10294名，较2024 年后移约3800名，与当年重庆物理类考生增加及招生计划扩大有关。2025年基准位次约10294名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划：2021年18人、2022年16人、2023 年17人、2024年20人、2025年23人、2026年（招生计划文件）20人。2026年计划较2025年减少3人（缩招约13%），缩招会加剧竞争，推动位次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属山东大学。山东大学（本部）软科中国大学排名第22名，威海校区共享山东大学办学层次与品牌效应，属于国内 顶尖高校梯队；2026年高考周期内山东大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要受2019年学伴活动舆情事件持续影响。抖音学校热度总排名第20位，评价为高热，短视频平 台曝光量高，报考关注度较高。历史投档异常记录中未见威海校区单独断档信号；山东大学拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、 马克思主义理论A等A类学科。威海校区开设的数学类、电子信息类、经济学类等专业与本部优势学科高度关联，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年重庆物理类考生按 近年占比约65.5%估算约136895人，较2025年139478人减少约2583人（-1.9%），考生总数小幅下降。重庆物理类本科批2025年为425分，近年稳定在425-427分区间， 。电子信息类、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026年招生计划缩招13%加剧 竞争、重庆物理类考生小幅减少缓解竞争、学校985层次对高分考生的持续吸引力等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（竞争加剧），预测最低位次约9519 名，区间9019-10019名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7751, 8137, 7761, 6497, and 10294 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 6500-8100 range, but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift to 10294, moving back about 3800 positions compared to 2024, related to the increase in Chongqing Physics Category examinees and the expansion of enrollment plans. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10294; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category: 18 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 23 in 2025, and 20 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). The 2026 plan reduces by 3 compared to 2025 (a decrease of about 13%), which will intensify competition and push rankings forward (numerical decrease).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, affiliated with Shandong University. Shandong University (main campus) ranks 22nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, and the Weihai campus shares the level and brand effect of Shandong University, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shandong University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the continuous impact of the 2019 study partner incident. The overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 20th, evaluated as high heat, with high exposure on short video platforms and relatively high application attention. There is no record of a separate gap signal for the Weihai campus in historical admission anomalies; Shandong University has A+ disciplines such as Mathematics, and A disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, Control Science and Engineering, and Marxist Theory. The majors offered at the Weihai campus, such as Mathematics, Electronic Information, and Economics, are highly correlated with the advantageous disciplines of the main campus, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Chongqing Physics Category examinees, estimated at about 65.5% of the total in recent years, is approximately 136,895, a decrease of about 2,583 (-1.9%) compared to 139,478 in 2025, with a slight decline in total examinees. The undergraduate batch cutoff for Chongqing Physics Category in 2025 is 425 points, stable in the 425-427 range in recent years. Social popularity for engineering majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science remains relatively high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the 13% reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decrease in Chongqing Physics Category examinees easing competition, and the sustained attraction of the 985 level to high-scoring students, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (increased competition), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 9519, in the range of 9019-10019.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9019-10019, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics as the main choice, with Tier 1 Mathematics/Electronic Information as a reach (if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on reaching), and Tier 3 Marine Science as a safety. When ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 10019), priority should be given to Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1524, 1541, 1431, 1552, and 1511 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings have stabilized within the 1431-1552 range, with a fluctuation of about 120 places, showing an overall stable trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1511. The enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing: 6 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 7 in 2025, and 4 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents). The 2026 plan is reduced by 3 compared to 2025 (a decrease of about 43%), which is a significant reduction rate, but the absolute number is only 3 fewer, so the actual impact is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985/211/Double First-Class university. Shandong University ranks 22nd in the Soft Science Ranking. The Weihai campus shares the brand effect, which strongly attracts high-scoring History Category candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but the Weihai campus has low correlation with the main campus's 'study partner' incident. It ranks 20th in Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating high attention. Shandong University's advantageous disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A), Law (A-), and Applied Economics (A-) closely correspond to the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Economics) at the Weihai campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Chongqing is about 72,105, based on a recent proportion of approximately 34.5%, a decrease of about 1,268 (or -1.7%) from 73,373 in 2025. Social popularity for liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature is stable and relatively high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the long-term stable trend of History Category rankings around 1500, the significant reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (43%) but with a small absolute number, the slight decrease in History Category candidates, and the sustained attraction of the 985 level for liberal arts candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1132, with a range of 632 to 1632.
